race.description: Ladies Of Mack Griffith Racing CB Maiden Hcp
race.comment: PORTOFINO (1) returns and makes his stable debut for the Mack Griffith yard. His two runs in Sydney last campaign standout for a maiden of this status and is clearly the one to beat if he returns in that sort of form. HEAD KAHUNA (2) is racing well and has registered four minor placings in a row. Peaking now third-up and is from a leading stable. Looks the obvious danger. MOON DART (3) has improved at each start in his debut campaign. Did well last start but found one better at Narromine. Is open to further improvement fourth-up and can make his presence felt. SIBEILA (4) stuck on soundly when resuming last start to finish second at Narromine after showing good early speed. In the mix with that run under her belt. BINDAREE LASS (7) finished alongside SIBEILA and was also fresh. Is another likely improver that can't be forgotten.
